title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: python-awscrt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for python-awscrt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Python is an interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language, which includes modules, classes, exceptions, very high level dynamic data types and dynamic typing. Python supports interfaces to many system calls and libraries, as well as to various windowing systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update python-awscrt package to fix FIPS mode crash in awscli2 (JIRA:RHEL-131280)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: Update python-awscrt package to fix FIPS mode crash in awscli2

full_text:
An update for python-awscrt is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Python is an interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language, which includes modules, classes, exceptions, very high level dynamic data types and dynamic typing. Python supports interfaces to many system calls and libraries, as well as to various windowing systems.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update python-awscrt package to fix FIPS mode crash in awscli2 (JIRA:RHEL-131280)
